title: BerryGlow
description: BerryGlow makes Glow Berries give players a short Glowing effect when eaten
body:
## 📦 BerryGlow

**BerryGlow** is a simple **Fabric mod** that makes **Glow Berries** give the player the **Glowing effect** for a short time after eating them.

This uses Minecraft’s regular **Glowing effect**, the same outline effect given by **Spectral Arrows**.

The mod keeps the **vanilla Minecraft feel** while making **Glow Berries** a little more useful and fun to use.

✅ **Recommended for players who**:

- Want **Glow Berries** to feel more useful

- Like small **vanilla-style gameplay improvements**

- Enjoy simple **quality-of-life mods**

📸 **Images**

How to brew the new **Glowing Potions**.

![How to brew the new Glowing Potions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/521724a4c090cf8c921ae30af548b71befd744c8.png)

Another way to craft **Spectral Arrows**.

![Another way to craft Spectral Arrows](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6428957027759c8d1a31489b2893900556fd15fd.png)

All **options** you can change.

![All options you can change](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/41a2634aaff7b904d46a29be161ee0bab987bd86.png)

💬 If you want to **share feedback** or **ideas** about the project, please leave a comment on [**CurseForge**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/berryglow/comments)

Inspired from **camman18** video
